title: Is it possible to save the sent email address in a column when board items are being created through an email?
excerpt: I have a monday.com board where the items are being created though email only. Is there any way to save the sent email address into a column?

posts.author: isharak (Ishara Kularatna)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a monday.com board where the items are being created though email only. Is there any way to save the sent email address into a column?

posts.author: MikeB_Axanexa (Mike Buckiewicz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi There,

This is a common request and very useful idea I must add.

Our group creates these types of custom integrations to parse out information in an email to columns. Happy to show you how this is possible when you are ready. Please reach out here:

https://www.axanexa.com/contact-us/

Looking forward to connecting!

Mike B
Automation Architect

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml: @isharak Extract Updates marketplace app can help save sent email address into a monday.com column - Check it out and let me know if you have any questions.
